title: helianthemum croceum var. suffruticosum
intro: Helianthemum croceum var. suffruticosum, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cistus family (Cistaceae), native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Helianthemum croceum var. suffruticosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant effects, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
